text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So there's this girl who just lost a race,<n>and she's
here at school today...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wonder, what sort of gesture would<n>make her
feel better?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. In the language of flowers,<n>chamomile
symbolizes "energy in<n>adversity," so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, I think I'll make some<n>chamomile tea
for her. I hope it'll help<n>cheer her up!
